form.formComment: Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start 6th of 10 at Osmangazi All Weather on March 2 over 1900m, 8 len behind Probala with 60.5kg at $3.75. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Osmangazi All Weather on February 23 over 1900m, 2 len behind Miss Conqueror with 61kg at $2. Nicely placed to put the record straight.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd of 11 at Veliefendi All Weather on March 25 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Legendary Majesty carrying 58kg at $22.30. Before that 2nd of 8 at Veliefendi All Weather on March 18 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Secret Royal with 59kg at $4.75. In the money at the latest appearance and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on April 6 over 2000m, 6 len behind Mr Demirayak carrying 58kg at $5.45. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 19 over 1900m, 10 len behind Mogol carrying 57.5kg at $3.90. Everything points towards a big run.

form.formComment: At the latest run 6th of 8 at Antalya on March 24 over 1400m, 6 len behind Shawshank with 59.5kg at $9.70. The race before that 2nd in a small field at Antalya on March 13 over 2000m, 1.75 len behind Forthcoming Queen with 53kg at $9.35. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Most recently 9th of 11 at Osmangazi All Weather on March 9 over 1200m, 10 len behind My Dragon carrying 54kg at $19.50. The race before that won by 1.0 len at Osmangazi All Weather February 9 over 1200m defeating Olayin Asli carrying 58kg at $4.60. Doesn't look good enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Last start ran last in a small field at Antalya on April 2 over 1400m, 20 len behind Sercan Bey with 54kg at $45.10. Before that 6th of 8 at Antalya on February 12 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Salonikator carrying 58kg at $7. Has failed to show enough.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign eighth of 12 at Osmangazi All Weather January 12 over 1400m, 34 len behind Centuries Victory carrying 58kg at $11. On debut fifth of 11 at Osmangazi All Weather November 24 over 1300m, 21 len behind Khios carrying 55kg at $7.95. Faces a tough essay.
